title: Kenya Makes History at the 2025 Robotics Olympiad in Panama City
summary: Kass Digital covered Team Kenya's historic Silver Medal performance at the international robotics competition in Panama City, Panama.
details: Feature article covering Team Kenya's 1st Runners Up finish in the Winning Alliances at the international robotics challenge in Panama City.
Highlighted the team's journey from preparation in Kenya to winning on the international stage.
